texto: Words are power. The more words you know and can recognize, use, define, understand, the more power you will have as a human being... The more language you know, the more likely it is that no one can get over on you."selection from book: Our Difficult Sunlight: A Guide to Poetry, Literacy & Social Justice in Classroom & Community
autor: Quraysh Ali Lansana & Georgia A. Popoff
explicacao: Citação de Quraysh Ali Lansana & Georgia A. Popoff sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Words are power. The more words you know and can recognize, use, define, understand, the more pow…” articula reflexao, african-american, language em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como language e poetry.
